title: Bridge Essay: Semiology and Mechanisms of Near-Death Experiences.

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Visionary cosmologies — self-transcendence, mystical experience, numinous, awe, cosmic consciousness.

**Semiology and Mechanisms of Near-Death Experiences.**. Curr Neurol Neurosci Rep.. PMID: 31352520. DOI: 10.1007/s11910-019-0983-2. PURPOSE OF REVIEW: Near-death experiences (NDEs) are conscious perceptual experiences, including self-related emotional, spiritual, and mystical experiences, occurring in close encounters with death or in non-life-threatening situations. The origin of NDEs remains unknown. Here, we review recent advances in the understanding of NDE semiology and pathophysiology.
